phases.gate: inventory GitHub, package, host, ObjectStore application, extension, link, and rollback state
readers, aliases, explicit migration tools, backups, warnings, and proof fixtures pass before rename
canonical identity, GitHub rename, host registrations, scoped ObjectStore principal, extension listing, docs, and full suite pass together
phases.rollback: revert deployment registrations; never recreate old repository

phases.gate: canonical URL, old redirect, aliases, audit, release artefacts, and deprecation notice verified
phases.rollback: retain canonical repository and legacy-compatible readers

surfaces.strategy: update at v1; retain migration page and legacy link guidance
surfaces.proof: Sphinx links and public-clone docs pass

surfaces.strategy: rename once at v1; update controlled remotes; do not recreate old name
surfaces.proof: canonical URL and old redirect verified

surfaces.strategy: canonical package names with forwarding/deprecation where published
surfaces.proof: Cargo metadata, CLI version, artefact, and compatibility tests pass

surfaces.strategy: legacy wrapper preserves arguments and warns through compatibility window
canonical manifest plus host-controlled legacy redirect/alias
surfaces.proof: host-session and mount contract tests pass

surfaces.strategy: versioned manifest alias; never change tenant, project, catalogue, or audit identity by label
register/rotate through DAS authority; preserve historical principal in audit records
surfaces.proof: scope, revocation, and provenance tests pass

surfaces.strategy: retain legacy readers/schema IDs; add canonical fields only through explicit migration
surfaces.proof: configuration and catalogue migration fixtures pass

surfaces.strategy: never rekey or rewrite committed media for branding
keep published gecko.id; otherwise choose Pinakotheke ID before first signing; re-pair explicitly
surfaces.proof: upgrade, pairing, revocation, origin, and destination tests pass

surfaces.strategy: update controlled references and preserve release provenance
surfaces.proof: clean clone, tag, SBOM, checksum, and link checks pass

proof_cases.expected: read unchanged or idempotently migrate with backup and report
historic identities, checksums, and audit records remain readable
endpoint, ObjectStore, key, checksum, and range semantics remain stable
explicit reviewed re-pair preserves origin, revocation, and destination safeguards
